analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal flip transformation required to read the mirrored clock correctly and did not calculate the time offset.
The tool failed to actually transform the image (it returned the input unchanged), and the agent lacks the logic to perform the mirror-to-standard time conversion.
The agent correctly identified the time as 7:10 from the fixed image but performed the addition incorrectly (7:10 + 9:35 = 16:45, not 4:45).
The agent consistently misreads the clock time from the corrected image, identifying it as 7:10 instead of 4:10.
The agent consistently misreads the clock face in the corrected image (reading 7:10 instead of 4:10) and fails to perform the time addition correctly.
